 AC Cable length is assumed to be within 40 meters

Based on the details we are quoting for the supply and installation of a 5.5 KWp on-grid solar system.







The total investment for your 5.5 kWp solar system is 3,60,177 /- 

The above pricing is inclusive of Supply and renewal of 5 Nos 335 Wp panel.

The above pricing is not inclusive of Structure Fabrication and Civil Works.

The graph above represents the total savings you will make in a year. Considering the increase in electricity prices you are looking at a payback period of 6 years.

Your lifetime savings with the proposed system is 14.00 lakhs INR at the minimum—the monthly Power production of your Roof-Top Solar System. The average output of the year is 660 Units/ Month.

2 Company Profile

2.1 Shiroi Energy

Shiroi Energy is part of the Rite choice group focusing on the burgeoning renewable energy market in India. We deal with system integration (Design, erection, and commissioning) of solar energy systems. We are involved in rooftop PV systems under both on-grid and off-grid categories and in utility-scale grid interactive MW-scale farms. We are certified channel partners with both MNRE and TEDA, the state and central nodal agencies for renewable energy systems for our solar systems.
